en: Damn Rolos. Hey, you're back. Hey.
How was your conference?
It was terrible. I fought with my colleagues the entire time.
Are you kidding with this? So your weekend was a total bust?
No. I got to see Donald Trump waiting for an elevator. Hi.
Hey, you're back too.
ko: 안녕. 어, 너도 돌아왔어. 응, 챈들러, 잠깐만 밖에서 얘기 좀 할 수 있어?

en: Yeah. Um, Jinder, can I talk to you outside for just a second? Hey, how was your chef thing?
ko: 안녕. 어, 너도 돌아왔어. 응, 챈들러, 잠깐만 밖에서 얘기 좀 할 수 있어?

en: thing it's awful i guess some people just don't appreciate really good food well maybe it was the
ko: 어, 요리사 행사 어땠어? 최악이었어. 진짜 맛있는 음식을 못 알아보는 사람들도 있나 봐.

en: kind of food that tasted good at first but then made everybody vomit and have diarrhea

en: handler monica
hey hey mr bing that uh hotel you stayed at called said someone left an eyelash curler in your room

en: Yes, that was mine.
ko: 응, 그거 내 거야. 난 네가 어떤 여자 만나서 그 여자가 놓고 간 줄 알았는데.

en: Because I figured you hooked up with some girl and she left it there. Yes, that would have made more sense.
ko: 응, 그거 내 거야. 난 네가 어떤 여자 만나서 그 여자가 놓고 간 줄 알았는데.

en: You know, I don't even feel like I know you anymore, man. All right?
Look, I'm just going to ask you this one time, all right? And whatever you say, I'll believe you.
Were you, or were you not, on a gay cruise? Hey, hey. Hey.
Oh, hey, Monica.
I heard you saw Donald Trump at your convention.
Yeah, saw him waiting for an elevator.
Hey Rach can I borrow your eyelash curler I think I lost mine Yeah it in the back
Joey, can I talk to you for a second? Wait!
Yes. Yes. You? And you?
Yes, but you cannot tell anyone. No one knows. How? When? It happened in London.
In London? No, you don't know!
The reason we didn't tell anyone
was because we didn't want to make a big deal out of it. But it is a big deal! I have to tell someone!
You can't.
Please, please, we just don't want to deal with telling everyone
Okay? Just promise you won't tell.
All right.
Man, this is unbelievable.
I mean, it's great, but...
I know it's great.
Oh, I don't want to see that. We're so stupid.
Do you know what's going on in there?
They're trying to take Joey.
